config-element.name: RuntimeState
config-element.description: Runtime state for the Adaptive Snapshot Cleanup workflow. Holds the distributed mutex lock.

att.name: runLock
att.description: Active run ID if a run is in progress, empty string if no run is active. DO NOT edit manually unless a run aborted without releasing.

att.name: lastRunId
att.description: Run ID of the last completed run (informational).

att.name: lastRunCompletedAt
att.description: ISO timestamp of the last completed run.

config-element.name: FileLogging
config-element.description: File share configuration for structured run logs.

att.name: shareType
att.description: 'nfs' or 'smb'. Determines which path and credential set is used.

att.name: logFormat
att.description: 'json' or 'csv'. Format of the written log file.

att.name: nfsPath
att.description: Local mount point on the vRO appliance where the NFS share is mounted. Example: /mnt/vro-logs/snapshot-cleanup — the vRO appliance must have this NFS export mounted at the OS level.

att.name: smbUncPath
att.description: Local mount point on the vRO appliance where the CIFS/SMB share is mounted. Example: /mnt/smb-logs/snapshot-cleanup — mount the share on the vRO appliance with: mount -t cifs //fileserver/share /mnt/smb-logs -o username=USER,password=PASS,domain=DOMAIN

att.name: smbUsername
att.description: Username for SMB share authentication (used when mounting at OS level).

att.name: smbPassword
att.description: Password for the SMB share user. Stored as SecureString (encrypted at rest in vRO).

config-element.name: Thresholds
config-element.description: Default I/O governor thresholds for the Adaptive Snapshot Cleanup workflow.

att.name: latencyThresholdMs
att.description: VMFS/NFS: projected total latency ceiling in milliseconds. Default 30ms. Tune to your storage SLA.

att.name: vsanCongestionThresh
att.description: vSAN: max projected congestion score (0-255). Default 50. Values above 128 indicate serious congestion.

att.name: vsanResyncThresholdGB
att.description: vSAN: max projected resync queue depth in GB. Default 10GB.

att.name: maxParallelPerVcenter
att.description: Max concurrent consolidation tasks per vCenter. Default 3. Raise only after validating governor behaviour.

att.name: governorPollIntervalSec
att.description: How often (seconds) to re-check the governor when blocked. Default 30.

att.name: taskTimeoutSeconds
att.description: Max seconds to wait for a vCenter snapshot removal task to complete. Default 1800 (30 min). Large snapshot chains can take longer.
